chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Family Transfer App. No. S – 23 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 29.03.2024 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate along with applicant. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. – This transfer application seeks transfer of Execution Application No.03/2020 in Family Suit No.130/2019 (Re: Mst. Rizwana versus Ghulam Akbar alias Akbar) pending before learned Family Judge, Mehrabpur, to learned Family Judge, Kandiaro on the ground that initially the case was pending before Family Judge, Kandiaro, where it was decided, and in terms of such decision, the parties have been awarded visiting rights to see their kids. Applicant is a resident of Kandiaro, whereas, respondent is resident of Khairpur Nathan Shah, District Dadu, from where he brings children for meeting with applicant on 26th of every month. Subsequently, the entire Court from Kandiaro was transferred to Mehrabpur, and hence, this case was also transferred there on administrative ground. 2. Respondent, although having been served, has chosen to remain absent. Learned AAG Sindh has, however, recorded no objection. 3. Accordingly, this application is allowed. Family Suit No.130/2019 (Re: Mst. Rizwana versus Ghulam Akbar alias Akbar) is withdrawn from the file of learned Family Judge, Mehrabpur, and transferred to learned Family Judge, Kandiaro for further proceedings. The application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
